title: Questions
wikitext:
[]: Questions             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Tue Aug 22, 2006 5:28 pm -If humans have AT fields, then how come you can only see angels and Eva units with an actual force field? -Why didn't SEELE want Shogouki to have a S^2 engine? -Just to make sure: D&R/EoE/Revival wasn't orginally intended and was made after Anno got death threats from EoTV, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Aug 22, 2006 5:37 pm 1) Lack of sheer power 2) Presumably, to keep that tricksy Ikari woman on a short leash 3) There is TV format rough artwork ( like this ) of something like EoE; and definite references in episode 25 to what we see unfolding in EoE (Misato & Ritsuko dead, Eva-02 in the lake). Between TV airing and the movie there were enraged letters and graffiti directed at Anno (and shown in part of the flashing image montages in EoE).

[]: Re: Questions             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Aug 22, 2006 5:53 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: -If humans have AT fields, then how come you can only see angels and Eva units with an actual force field?

[]:             Quote Post by Bardiel » Wed Aug 23, 2006 4:07 am -I think it also has something to do with evolution. In End of Evangelion Misato said that the Angels are different possebility's of what we could of become. De human form clearly only needed the AT field to protect there soul and make them seperate bieng. The Angels however evolved to a form where they needed the AT field as a weapon. Its just my opinion though its a simple theorie. -Like mr Tines said: control. SEELE wanted to control everything, they could'nt of done it otherwise sinds there goal was to control the third impact any and all elements involved must be under there control, like the mass-produced eva's for example. -concerning the third question I think Ornette Coleman explained thouroughly enough

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Wed Aug 23, 2006 4:34 am Yea, just a difference between whether you want the fruit of wisdom or the fruit of strength. I'll choose wiisdom. Look at our fellow Angel cousins, so ugly. I'd rather give up my strength and immotality for a PC and good food.
